jsonLd.title: BlueStone is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, BlueStone in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BlueStone:
BlueStone is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
